text: Upon entering this space, I sense a combination of curiosity and displacement. The environment is sterile and orderly, yet what lies beyond the glass seems to beckon with a promise of thoughtful exploration. I notice the emphasis on research and development, and I feel both anticipation and a subtle wariness—what sort of questions will arise here, and will I find answers, or only more questions? The theme of human connection and coexistence with intelligent machines provokes an introspective mood, casting me as both observer and participant in a shared search for meaning.
